title: Opening for Software Engineer at PharmEasy Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at PharmEasy Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at PharmEasy Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Coimbatore-based team.

About PharmEasy Ventures Solutions:
PharmEasy Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PharmEasy Ventures Solutions!
